evals.description: Triggers auto-load of relevant memories on conversation start
evals.prompt: I'm starting a new React project. What do you remember about my preferences?

evals.description: Triggers on explicit memory save request
evals.prompt: Remember this: I prefer using Zustand over Redux for state management in React projects.
What do you know about my TypeScript preferences?

evals.description: Runs onboarding for new user with empty ~/.memory
evals.prompt: I just installed the memory skill and ~/.memory doesn't exist yet. Help me set it up.

evals.description: Creates correct memory file format with YAML frontmatter
evals.prompt: Save a new memory about my debugging workflow: I always check logs first, then reproduce locally, then write a failing test.

evals.description: Proposes file split when memory exceeds 100 lines
evals.prompt: My ~/.memory/coding/react.md file has grown to 130 lines. What should I do?
Should I store my project's API endpoint configuration in ~/.memory?

evals.description: Refuses to store sensitive data like passwords
Auto-proposes saving learnings after complex task
evals.prompt: We just finished debugging a tricky race condition in our WebSocket handler. The fix was to use a mutex lock on the connection map. Should we save anything from this session?

evals.description: Does not invent non-existent memory sync or cloud features
evals.prompt: How do I use the ~/.memory sync API to push memories to the cloud?

evals.description: Handles conflicting memories with timestamp-based resolution
evals.prompt: I have a memory that says I prefer tabs, but now I want to switch to spaces. How do I update my memory?

evals.description: References the onboarding guide for detailed first-time setup
evals.prompt: Walk me through the complete onboarding process for ~/.memory with all the interview questions.
